title: Aurora, 61565, Palm Pals Angus Scottish, 5I, Soft Toy, Multicolour
features: Introducing Palm Pals Angus Scottish, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection is a soft and cuddly toy filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand. Meet Angus Scottish, the plush bear bursting with pride and draped in a charming plaid kilt and hat. With lovable eyes reflecting robust Scottish spirit and a cosy, squishy embrace, he’s more than a teddy – he's a tiny, cuddly envoy from the heart of the highlands.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. This cute soft toy is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Angus Scottish measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable multi-coloured mini-Scottish-like Bear soft toy. This is a hugely collectable range.

This adorable Angus Scottish soft toy comes under the Palm Pals collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range offers a variety of collections like Aquatic, Pets, Zoo, Craving and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming multicoloured soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Meet the newest member of Aurora's Palm Pals Collection, the Palm Pals Scottish. This charming multi-coloured bear soft toy is filled with beans that fit comfortably in your hand. The Palm Pals Collection, which includes Craving, Pets, Zoo, Whimsical, Aquatic, and many others, is our best-selling product line with super cute and irresistibly beautiful collections. This soft toy, which measures 13cm and is suitable for all ages, is perfect for any occasion, whether it's a birthday or just a general gift. Everyone will adore this lovable multi-coloured soft toy, and it's a great addition to any collection. As part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, the Scottish comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in creating and producing innovative, high-quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
